description: A candid event photograph from a Presidential Fitness Test / youth sports event on the White House South Lawn. President Donald Trump, in a dark navy suit and red tie, stands smiling at center giving a thumbs-up, surrounded by a group of about a dozen smiling children and teenagers wearing athletic gear; several wear navy or red t-shirts bearing what appears to be a presidential/eagle crest, and one boy at front holds a soccer ball. At right stands a man in a light gray suit (an official or athlete guest). The setting is a sunny green lawn with trees and a glimpse of a domed government building in the background. There is no on-image text or graphic overlay, so this is a candid photo rather than a designed meme. The White House posted it as part of its 'Reviving the Presidential Fitness Test' / National Physical Fitness & Sports Month messaging, presenting Trump as engaged with healthy, all-American youth for a general public audience.
